title: tragacantha neurocarpa
intro: Tragacantha neurocarpa, also known as the neurocarp spiny restharrow or hairy restharrow, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha neurocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues.
